fault_hypothesis: The clamping logic is incorrectly inverted. The condition on line 65 should be `if clamp:` instead of `if not clamp:`, causing the function to clamp when it should extrapolate and vice-versa.

constraints.intent: The logic for handling extrapolation (when t is outside [0,1]) is faulty, and this condition separates passing interpolation tests from failing extrapolation tests.

spec.expr: y__1 >= min(y0, y1) and y__1 <= max(y0, y1)

constraints.intent: When clamp is False, the value should not be modified, so this clamping path should only be taken for values already in range.

spec.expr: y__1 >= min(y0, y1) and y__1 <= max(y0, y1)

constraints.intent: When clamp is True, this path is taken but fails to clamp extrapolated values; it should only be taken if the value is already in range.
